title: OpenAI Rate Limit Error with OpenRouter Node
symptom: When invoking the OpenRouter Node with a specific model, the error 'OpenAI: Rate limit reached' occurs. This prevents the workflow from executing successfully.
root_cause: The error occurs because the selected model 'moonshotai/kimi-k2:free' has a rate limit that is being exceeded. This can happen if the model is being called too frequently or if the API key has restrictions on usage.
fix_steps: Save the changes and re-run the workflow
agent_instruction: Switch to the 'moonshotai/kimi-k2' model in the OpenRouter Node settings.
